name: Account
description: Owned asset or liability account identity and lifecycle. Historical transactions retain RESTRICT references after archival.
schema_def: - maskedIdentifier: text, required, never a full account number

Constraints: first release accepts owned asset and liability accounts; accountType deterministically defines accountClass; active masked identity is unique within institution; archived accounts reject new transactions; no hard delete. OQ-LEDGER-4 is resolved by all-account evidence.
